contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 100
- Description: Just competed the conversation with Liz. 
  
  Seems tentatively the target is for 10,000 trees planted in the ground 
  
  The Campaign will be based out of the Ohio region
  
  Which equates to 10,000 X 50 gram bars 
  
  What exactly gets shipped to Ohio… to be confirmed… depends on the facility the community has available there…
  
  If they can do more, we will ship more basic level stuff over… if not then a lot more raw material conversion is required to be done over on the Brazil side before it gets shipped…
  
  But seems like it’s going to be a pre-purchase… I made it very explicit… the current consignment based model is limited in the volume it can support since the funds available is finite… 🤔🤷
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh, Elizabeth Wong
